ticket.subject: CRITICAL: Database credentials exposed in Docker image layer
ticket.body: Our DevOps team discovered production database credentials hardcoded in a Docker image that was pushed to our public Docker Hub registry 2 hours ago. The image has been deleted but may have been pulled by unknown parties. We require immediate credential rotation, a list of all image pulls during the exposure window, and an urgent audit of database access logs. This is being treated as a potential active compromise.
